steps.title: Set up the purchase equation
steps.content:
Let $p$ be the original price of one hoodie. Seven hoodies cost $7p$ dollars before the coupon, and the $35$-dollar coupon leaves a final cost of $105$:
$$
7p-35=105
$$

steps.title: Solve for one hoodie
steps.content: Add $35$ to both sides and divide by $7$: $$ 7p=140 $$ $$ p=20 $$ The answer is 20.
